title: Cosplay Library Analytics
subtitle: A rebuilt statistics app for very large cosplay archives with persistent cache, sortable rankings, cover previews, and multilingual localization flows.
scan_note_idle: A full traversal only happens on the first build or when you manually rescan. Normal page loads read the cached database.
scan_note_running: While scanning, the page shows the active folder plus running totals for cosers, sets, images, and storage size.
scan_note_failed: The scan failed. Check the mounted library path or database settings.
sort_title: Charts default to descending image count and can switch metric anytime
detail_empty: Choose an item to load its set covers.
i18n_title: Export / import names and manage multilingual data
i18n_hint: The exported CSV includes keys, raw names, existing translations, and stats, so it can be localized by AI and imported back. UI copy is also driven by JSON locale files.
empty_library: No cached data yet. Run a full scan first.
